title: Blooms
description: This mods adds 6 new flowers which can be collected from different biomes
body:
## This mods adds 6 new flowers which can be collected from different biomes
- Blue Bells (Taiga)
- Closed Moonlit Blossom (Dark Forest)
- Gladiolus (Jungle, Sparse Jungle)
- Forget Me Not (Forest)
- Opened Moonlit Blossom (Dark Forest)
- Small Forget Me Not (Forest)
